title: Lavender Creamy Croatian Cheese Fritters
description: Floral, gooey fritters bursting with Croatian sheep cheese and lavender, served with caramelized onion rings and a tangy fermented yogurt dip.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat and set aside 2 tbsp for frying the fritters.
Add the sliced onion rings to the skillet, season with salt and pepper, and cook until caramelized, about 5-7 minutes. Remove and keep warm.
In a bowl, whisk the beaten egg, shredded cheese, dried lavender, cumin, paprika, and cayenne pepper until well combined.
Stir in the almond flour until a thick batter forms. The mixture should be moist but hold its shape.
Drop spoonfuls of the batter into the hot oil, flatten slightly, and fry until golden brown on both sides, about 3 minutes per side.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and sprinkle with a pinch of salt.
Serve the warm fritters with the caramelized onion rings and a side of yogurt dip.
Drizzle a little lemon zest over the fritters for brightness (optional).
